scripts.build:cf: opennextjs-cloudflare build && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/_worker.js && cp -r .open-next/assets/. .open-next/ && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),f='.open-next/cloudflare/init.js';fs.writeFileSync(f,fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace('__ASSETS_RUN_WORKER_FIRST__: false','__ASSETS_RUN_WORKER_FIRST__: true'))"
